COVERGROUP alu_cg
  COVERPOINT op_type
    BIN add HITS 120
    BIN sub HITS 88
    BIN overflow_add HITS 0
    BIN overflow_sub HITS 0
  CROSS op_type_x_operand_sign
    BIN add_pos_pos HITS 45
    BIN add_neg_neg HITS 0

COVERGROUP fifo_cg
  COVERPOINT fill_level
    BIN empty HITS 200
    BIN half HITS 150
    BIN full HITS 0
    BIN almost_full HITS 3

COVERGROUP apb_cg
  COVERPOINT reset_state
    BIN reset_during_write HITS 0
    BIN reset_idle HITS 300

CODE_COVERAGE MODULE alu_unit
  LINE 87.5
  BRANCH 72.1
  TOGGLE 65.0
  FSM 90.0

CODE_COVERAGE MODULE fifo_unit
  LINE 91.0
  BRANCH 80.4
  TOGGLE 70.2
  FSM 95.0

CODE_COVERAGE MODULE apb_slave
  LINE 76.3
  BRANCH 60.0
  TOGGLE 55.5
  FSM 82.0
